site.title: Azzam Abidurrahman Mujahid
site.summary: I am Azzam Abidurrahman Mujahid, a 22-year-old Mechatronics Engineering student at Politeknik Elektronika Negeri Surabaya (PENS). I have a strong foundation in mechanical design and component manufacturing, along with solid understanding of electronics and programming. I am a dedicated and hardworking person, driven by a commitment to deliver excellent results, and always motivated to keep learning through practical professional experience.

about.intro: I am passionate about building mechatronics systems that integrate mechanics, electronics, and software into reliable real-world solutions.
highlights: Strong curiosity, fast learning, and practical execution

education.degree: Bachelor of Applied Science (D4), Mechatronics Engineering
education.details: Current GPA: 3.72 (2022-2026). Relevant coursework: Industrial Automation, Robotics, Programming, Microprocessors, Microcontrollers, Industrial Electrical Systems, Automatic Control, Machining, Manufacturing, Sensors and Actuators, Signals and Systems, Kinematics, Electrical Circuits, Electronic System Design, Statistics and Dynamics, Mechanical Design, CNC, Engineering Mathematics, Mechanics of Materials, Analog Electronics, and Digital Electronics.

experience.role: Expert Staff, Technology Research and Social Affairs Department
experience.details: Supervise work programs, take ownership of execution, prepare activity reports with evaluation and improvement recommendations, and mentor new members in organizational governance and role responsibilities.
Lead and oversee community service initiatives focused on technology implementation and social-impact issues.
Prepared logistics reporting and coordinated participant consumption during the event.
Managed event equipment and delivered material in orientation forums.

projects.title: Two-Wheel Balancing Robot
projects.description: Designed and developed a two-wheel balancing robot covering mechanical design, electrical architecture, and control programming.

projects.title: Differential Drive Mobile Robot (DDMR) Dashboard GUI
projects.description: Designed robot control logic, communication architecture, and dashboard GUI for system monitoring and command.

projects.title: Laser Cutting CNC Machine Design
projects.description: Designed a laser cutting CNC machine, performed machining processes, and completed mechanical-electrical assembly.

photos.alt: Laser cutting CNC machine design and assembly
Laser CNC mechanical and electrical integration details

projects.title: PID Position Control of Motor with Propeller
projects.description: Developed an analog PID-based position control system for a propeller motor using sensor input and setpoint tracking to achieve smooth and accurate response.

photos.alt: PID motor position control circuit and hardware
Motor response behavior based on setpoint

contact.message: Open to internship opportunities, mechatronics project collaborations, and technical discussions in design, control, and robotics systems.
